html.nextop-chat-mobile-widget-expanded,
body.nextop-chat-mobile-widget-expanded {
	overflow: hidden !important;
	height: 100% !important;
	width: 100% !important;
	position: fixed !important;
	margin: 0 !important;
	top: 0 !important;
	left: 0 !important;
}

.nextop-chat {
	visibility: hidden;
	opacity: 0;
	position: fixed;
	max-height: calc(100% - 40px);
	max-width: calc(100% - 40px);
	-webkit-transition: 0.2s linear;
	transition: 0.2s linear;
	-webkit-transition-property: visibility, opacity;
	transition-property: visibility, opacity;
	-webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
	backface-visibility: hidden;
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 0;
	min-width: 0;
	display: block;
	-webkit-box-sizing: content-box;
	box-sizing: content-box;
	padding: 0;
	margin: 0;
}

@media print {
	.nextop-chat {
		display: none;
	}
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper,
.nextop-chat__iframe {
	left: 0 !important;
	top: 0 !important;
	height: 100% !important;
	width: 100% !important;
	min-width: 100% !important;
	max-width: 100% !important;
	min-height: 100% !important;
	max-height: 100% !important;
	margin: 0 !important;
	padding: 0 !important;
	display: block !important;
	background: transparent !important;
	opacity: 1;
	-webkit-transform: none;
	transform: none;
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	position: absolute;
	-webkit-box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
	box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
	overflow: hidden !important;
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper,
.nextop-chat--safari .nextop-chat__iframe,
.nextop-chat--webkit.nextop-chat--expanded .nextop-chat__iframe {
	border-radius: 12px;
}

.nextop-chat--mobile-widget:not(.nextop-chat--expanded),
.nextop-chat--mobile-widget:not(.nextop-chat--expanded) * {
	cursor: pointer;
}

.nextop-chat--safari .nextop-chat__iframe {
	-webkit-mask-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(#000), to(#000));
	-webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(#000, #000);
	mask-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(#000), to(#000));
	mask-image: linear-gradient(#000, #000);
	-webkit-mask-position: 50% 50%;
	mask-position: 50% 50%;
	-webkit-mask-size: 100% 100%;
	mask-size: 100% 100%;
	-webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
	mask-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.nextop-chat:not(.nextop-chat--expanded) .nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	-webkit-transition: 0.2s linear;
	transition: 0.2s linear;
	-webkit-transition-property: -webkit-box-shadow;
	transition-property: -webkit-box-shadow;
	transition-property: box-shadow;
	transition-property:
		box-shadow,
		-webkit-box-shadow;
}

.nextop-chat:not(.nextop-chat--expanded):hover .nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	-webkit-box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),

  .jdgm-write-review-modal {
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__overlay {

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__text,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__product-title,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__stars::before,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__stars::after,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-label,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-label-help,
    .jdgm-write-review-modal__chip-label,

    }

      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__btn--leave-review {
      color: #F46A26;
      border: 2px solid #F46A26;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__btn--leave-review:hover {
      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    /* Other-product cards: apply merchant theme colours */

      color: #333333;
    }

      color: #F46A26;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__stars .jdgm-star {
      color: #F46A26;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__stars::before {
      visibility: visible;
      content: 'Poor';
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__stars::after {
      visibility: visible;
      content: 'Great';
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__page--review-details {
      .jdgm-write-review-modal__page-header {
        margin-bottom: 60px;
      }

      .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-group--stars .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-error {

      }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-input {

    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-input:focus {
      border-color: #F46A26;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__chip-input:checked+.jdgm-write-review-modal__chip-label {
      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__chip-label:hover {
      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__checkbox-input:checked+.jdgm-write-review-modal__checkbox-custom {
      border-color: #F46A26;
      background-color: #F46A26;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-group--media-upload {
      border-radius: 0;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__page .jdgm-form__fieldset .jdgm-picture-fieldset__box--input {
      background-color: #fafafa;
      border-color: #F46A26;
      border-radius: 0;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__page .jdgm-picture-fieldset__delete {
      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__page .jdgm-picture-fieldset__delete:hover {
      background-color: #F46A26;
      color: #ffffff;
    }

    .jdgm-write-review-modal__field-group.jdgm-cf {
      .jdgm-rev__slider-range {
        border-radius: 0;
        background-color: #F46A2633;
      }

      .jdgm-rev__slider-range::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        border-color: #F46A26;
      }

      .jdgm-rev__slider-range::-moz-range-thumb {
        border-color: #F46A26;
      }
    }

    .jdgm-coupon-banner {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.9), rgba(255,255,255,0.9)), linear-gradient(90deg, #F46A26, #F46A26);
      color: #333333;
      border-radius: 0;
    }

    @media only screen and (min-width: 768px) {
      .jdgm-write-review-modal__content {
        border-radius: 0;
      }
    }
  }
</style>

@font-face {
    font-family: "xcotton_font_family";
    src: 
        url('data:application/x-font-woff2;charset=utf-8;base64,') format('woff2'),
        url('data:application/font-woff;base64,') format('woff');
}
.xcotton_font_family {
  font-family: "xcotton_font_family" !important;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 400;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

.xcotton-hot:before {
  content: "\e6b9";
}

.xcotton-bg_bf_color:before {
  content: "\e6b8";
}

.xcotton-highLight-icon:before {
    content: "\e602";
}

.xcotton-xcotton-subtract2:before {

}

.xcotton-xcotton-frame:before {
    content: "\e601";
}
.xcotton-shield-icon:before {

  :root {
    /* 颜色变量 */
    --xcotton-pp-color-bg: rgba(248, 248, 250, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-theme: #c5211a;
    --xcotton-pp-color-title: #000000;
    --xcotton-pp-color-subTitle: rgba(110, 110, 115, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-year: rgba(110, 110, 115, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-checked-year: #ffffff;
    --xcotton-pp-color-original-price: rgba(181, 181, 181, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-original-checked-price: #ffffff;
    --xcotton-pp-color-price: #c5211a;
    --xcotton-pp-color-checked-price: #ffffff;
    --xcotton-pp-color-option: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-option-border: rgba(239, 239, 239, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-checked-option: #c5211a;
    --xcotton-pp-color-checked-option-border: #c5211a;
    --xcotton-pp-color-option-ext: rgba(0, 0, 0, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-border: rgba(239, 239, 239, 1);
    --xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-bg: transparent;

    /* 字体大小变量 */
    --xcotton-font-size-xs: 10px;
    --xcotton-font-size-sm: 12px;
    --xcotton-font-size-md: 14px;
    --xcotton-font-size-lg: 16px;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp {
    padding: 12px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-bg);
    text-align: left;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-style: Bold;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0%;
    line-height: 1.2;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-title);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-subTitle);
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-top: 6px;
    letter-spacing: 0%;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title *,
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle * {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title p span {
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle p span {
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-box {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-tip {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-decoration-style: solid;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-title);
    letter-spacing: 0%;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content {
    margin-top: 12px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 6px;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border-width: 1px;
    padding: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-border);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option);
    position: relative;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-year {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-year);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-money-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-price);
    padding: 8px 0;
  }

  
  .xcotton-productProtection__originalPrice {
    margin-left: 10px;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-decoration: line-through;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-original-price);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-border);
    letter-spacing: 0px;
    padding: 5px 0;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-bg);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text,.xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active {
    margin-left: 6px;
  }
  
  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active,
  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-halloweenSubtract {
    display: none;
  }

  .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext);
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  
  .xcotton-xcotton-subtract2 {
    color: #fff;
    display: none;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-halloween-bg {
    display: none;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    transform: scale(0.4);
    width: auto !important;
    height: auto !important;
    transform-origin: top right;
    border-top-right-radius: 6px;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-hot {
    transform: scale(1);
    font-size: 26px;
    line-height: 16px;
    top: 6px;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked.xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-price);
  }

  .xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection-halloween-bg {
    display: inline;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-hot {
    color: #fff;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-price);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__originalPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-original-checked-price);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-year {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-year);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text {
    display: none;
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    display: none;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active {
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-subtract2 {
    display: inline;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-wrapper {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
    border: 1px solid #fff;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked {
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option-border);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-label-icon {
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-content-text-img {
    margin: 0 3px !important;
    height: 18px !important;
    width: auto !important;
    vertical-align: middle !important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-content-text-img:nth-child(1) {
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-top: 0px!important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title .xcotton-content-text-img {
    height: 20px !important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle .xcotton-content-text-img {
    height: 16px !important;
    display: inline !important;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 1200px) {
    .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title {
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection-tip {

  (function() {
    var jdgmThemeFixes = null;
    if (!jdgmThemeFixes) return;
    var thisThemeFix = jdgmThemeFixes[Shopify.theme.id];
    if (!thisThemeFix) return;

    if (thisThemeFix.html) {
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        var htmlDiv = document.createElement('div');
        htmlDiv.classList.add('jdgm-theme-fix-html');
        htmlDiv.innerHTML = thisThemeFix.html;
        document.body.append(htmlDiv);
      });
    };

    if (thisThemeFix.css) {
      var styleTag = document.createElement('style');
      styleTag.classList.add('jdgm-theme-fix-style');
      styleTag.innerHTML = thisThemeFix.css;
      document.head.append(styleTag);
    };

    if (thisThemeFix.js) {
      var scriptTag = document.createElement('script');
      scriptTag.classList.add('jdgm-theme-fix-script');
      scriptTag.innerHTML = thisThemeFix.js;
      document.head.append(scriptTag);
    };
  })();
</script>

<script defer="">
    class WattGlobalMenuWidget extends HTMLElement {
        constructor() {
            super();
            this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
            this.shadowRoot.innerHTML = `
                <style>
                    :host {
                        line-height: 0;
                        padding: 0 9px;
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu {
                        position: relative;
                        display: inline-block;
                        --flag-width: 25px;
                        --flag-radius: 2px;
                        --font-color: inherit;
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu .watt-global-menu__main {
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        justify-content: center;
                        gap: 10px;
                        cursor: pointer;
                        padding: 8px;
                        color: var(--font-color);
                        border-radius: 4px;
                        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu .watt-global-menu__main:hover {
                        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu__main-flag {
                        border-radius: var(--flag-radius);
                        width: var(--flag-width);
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu__main-arrow {
                        font-size: 14px;
                        transition: transform 0.5s ease;
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu.active .watt-global-menu-dropdown {
                        display: block;
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu.active .watt-global-menu__main-arrow {
                        transform: rotate(180deg);
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu-dropdown {
                        position: absolute;
                        top: 120%;
                        right: 0;
                        background: #ffffff;
                        display: none;
                        min-width: 100%;
                        max-width: 400px;
                        border-radius: 5px;
                        overflow: hidden;
                        color: var(--font-color);
                        box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                        z-index: 10;
                    }

                    .watt-global-menu-dropdown .watt-global-menu-dropdown__link {
                        display: flex;
                        align-items: center;
                        gap: 10px;

        connectedCallback() {
            const globalBtn = this.shadowRoot.querySelector('.watt-global-menu__main');
            const menuBox = this.shadowRoot.querySelector('.watt-global-menu');
            if (globalBtn && menuBox) {

                globalBtn.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                    event.stopPropagation(); 
                    menuBox.classList.toggle('active');
                });

                document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                    const insideMenu = menuBox.contains(event.target);
                    const insideBtn = globalBtn.contains(event.target);

                    if (!insideMenu && !insideBtn) {
                        menuBox.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                });
            }
        }

<script defer="">
class WattProductPageCollapsibleMsg extends HTMLElement {
  constructor() {
    super();
    this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
    this.viewMoreText = "View More";
    this.viewLessText = "View Less";
    this.marginTop = 10;
    this.marginBottom = 10;
    this.titleFontSize = 22;
    this.titleFontColor = "#f64d09";
    this.titleFontMarginBottom = 10;
    this.defaultCollapsibleHeight = 190;
    this.boxBgColor = "#f5f5f5";
    this.contentFontColor = "#111111";
    this.contentLinkColor = "#111111";
    
    this.shadowRoot.innerHTML = `
        <style>
            span.collapsible-title {
              display: inline-block;
              font-size: ${this.titleFontSize}px;
              margin-bottom: ${this.titleFontMarginBottom}px;
              font-weight: 700;
              color: ${this.titleFontColor};
            }
            #product-info {
                max-width: 800px;
                padding: 5px 10px 15px;
                margin: 10px auto 0;
                border-radius: 10px;
                background-color: ${this.boxBgColor};
            }
            #product-content {
                position: relative;
                padding: 16px 16px 0;
                border-radius: 8px;
                overflow: hidden;
                color: ${this.contentFontColor};
                max-height: ${this.defaultCollapsibleHeight}px;
                transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
            }
            #product-content a {
                color: ${this.contentLinkColor};
            }
            #product-content ul {
              padding-left: 1.05em!important;
              padding-inline-start: 1.05em!important;
              margin: 0!important;
            }
            #product-content ul li {
              padding-bottom: 10px;
            }
            #product-content ul li:last-child {
              padding-bottom: 0;
            }
            #product-content.expanded {
                max-height: 2000px;
                scrollbar-width: none;
                -ms-overflow-style: none;
                overflow-y: auto;
            }
            #product-content.expanded::-webkit-scrollbar {
              display: none; 
            }
            #product-content::after {
                position: absolute;
                content: "";
                bottom: 0;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                height: 60px;
                background: linear-gradient(to top, ${this.boxBgColor}, rgba(237,237,237,0));
                pointer-events: none;
                transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            }
            #product-content.expanded::after,
            #product-content.less-limit-height::after {
                opacity: 0;
            }
            #product-content.less-limit-height {
              padding-bottom: 15px;
            }
            #view {
                display: inline-flex;
                margin: 10px 0 0 10px;
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 600;
                color: ${this.titleFontColor};
                cursor: pointer;
                align-items: center;
                user-select: none;
            }
            #view .arrow {
                display: inline-block;
                width: 6px;
                height: 6px;
                margin: -2px 0 0 6px;
                border-left: 2px solid ${this.titleFontColor};
                border-bottom: 2px solid ${this.titleFontColor};
                transform: rotate(-45deg);
                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }
            #view.active .arrow {
                margin-top: 5px;
                transform: rotate(135deg);
            }
        </style>
        <div id="product-info" style="margin: ${this.marginTop}px 0 ${this.marginBottom}px 0;">
            <div id="product-content">
                
                
                  <p>25 × 9.61 × 8.58 in | 101.74 lbs</p><ul><li><strong>25% Core Upgrades: stronger 250A Smart BMS</strong> covers 10+ safety protections for worry-free power usage.</li><li><strong>6400W Continuous Output</strong>: operates high-powered devices simultaneously without tripping, use large appliances freely.</li><li><strong>5120Wh Massive Capacity</strong>: massive energy storage supports 24-hour operation for RV appliances and household devices.</li><li>10-Year Durability: <strong>6000+ Cycles at 80% Depth of Discharge </strong>features 0 maintenance costs, saving 70% the expenses compared to traditional batteries.</li><li>All-Scenario Adaptability: <strong>-4℉ to 140℉ + IP65 Waterproof</strong> covers fully scenarios in deserts, snowy, and home settings.</li><li><strong>10-Min Replacement for Lead-Acid: </strong>Supports seamless replacement for RVs, Home, and solar systems (LFP charger required) and Max. 2S4P connection.</li><li>For <strong>RV travel, home backup, outdoor living, and agricultural production</strong>—one choice for ten years of peace of mind!</li><li>Professional Certification: <strong>IEC/FCC/EMC/RoHS/CE/UN38.8</strong></li></ul>
                
            </div>
            <div id="view">
                <span id="toggle-text">${this.viewMoreText}</span>
                <span class="arrow"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
        `;
        this.viewMoreText = this.viewMoreText;
        this.viewLessText = this.viewLessText;
    }
    connectedCallback() {
        const productContent = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('product-content');
        const viewBtn = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('view');
        const toggleText = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('toggle-text');
        // 检查内容高度是否小于最小高度
        const minHeight = this.defaultCollapsibleHeight; // 与 CSS 中的 max-height 保持一致
        if (productContent.scrollHeight <= minHeight) {
            // 如果内容不足以触发折叠，就隐藏展开按钮
            viewBtn.style.display = 'none';
            productContent.classList.add('less-limit-height')
            
            return; // 不需要绑定事件
        }
        viewBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const expanded = productContent.classList.toggle('expanded');
            viewBtn.classList.toggle('active', expanded);
            toggleText.textContent = expanded ? this.viewLessText : this.viewMoreText;
        });
    }

}

if (!customElements.get('watt-product-page-collapsible-msg')) {
  customElements.define('watt-product-page-collapsible-msg', WattProductPageCollapsibleMsg);
}
</script>
